title: ICAR CRRI Project Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: ICAR - Central Rice Research Institute, Cuttack
short_info: ICAR - Central Rice Research Institute, Cuttack (ICAR CRRI) Project Fellow Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. 08/PF/2026-27 on the official website of ICAR CRRI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR CRRI Project Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation as per rule for SC, ST and OBC candidates.

selection_process: Written-cum-personal interview Screening test (if large number of candidates)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Fellow position at ICAR CRRI Cuttack is scheduled for 01 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the Project Fellow position?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Project Fellow post is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC, ST, and OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Fellow role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Fellow position, candidates must possess a Master of Science (M.Sc.) degree in Microbiology, Botany, or Biotechnology.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Fellow position will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 19,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Project Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for the Project Fellow recruitment at ICAR CRRI Cuttack. This applies to all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Fellow post will involve a written-cum-personal interview. A screening test may be conducted if a large number of candidates apply.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for ICAR CRRI Project Fellow recruitment being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at ICAR - Central Rice Research Institute, Cuttack, Odisha, with the pincode 753006.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable), along with recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the Project Fellow position is a contractual job. The recruitment is for a specific project duration as per the institute's requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.
